2606.17996.title: Multiple cyclicity and Wavelet Decomposition with Channel Correlation for Long-term Time Series Forecasting
2606.17996.paper_summary: Cyclicity and trend are important components of time series data and many studies based on cyclicity and trend have achieved good results in long-term time series forecasting. However, we believe that current work neglects the influence of real-world inter-channel correlations in time series data which leads to suboptimal predictions. Furthermore, these models rely on complex designs to capture diverse information so that resulting in low computational efficiency. To address this challenge, we propose McWC, a long-term time series forecasting model that separately models the cyclicity, trend, and inter-channel correlations. Specifically, McWC first decouples cyclical information from data using a multi-layer cyclicity construction module. Then, it extracts inter-channel correlations using multi-layer perceptron. Next, it models and fuses the multi-layer high-frequency and low-frequency information from data using a multi-level wavelet decomposition module. Finally, it aggregates the results of different components to obtain the output. Simultaneously, we decouple intra-channel autocorrelations by calculating a loss function in the frequency domain. Experiments on six real-world datasets demonstrate that McWC achieves state-of-the-art performance, exhibiting excellent computational efficiency and historical information extraction capabilities.
2606.17996.paper_summary_zh: Cyclicity 和趨勢是時間序列數據的重要組成部分，許多基於循環性和趨勢的研究在長期時間序列預測中取得了良好的結果。<lb/>然而，我們認為目前的工作忽略了時間序列數據中現實世界通道間相關性的影響，這導致了次優的預測。<lb/>此外，這些模型依賴於複雜的設計來捕捉多樣的信息，從而導致計算效率低下。<lb/>為了解決這一挑戰，我們提出了 McWC，一種長期時間序列預測模型，該模型分別建模循環性、趨勢和通道間的相關性。<lb/>具體而言，McWC 首先使用多層循環性構建模塊將循環信息從數據中解耦。<lb/>然後，它使用多層感知器提取通道間的相關性。<lb/>接下來，它使用多層小波分解模塊建模並融合來自數據的多層高頻和低頻信息。<lb/>最後，它聚合不同組件的結果以獲得輸出。<lb/>同時，我們通過在頻域中計算損失函數來解耦通道內自相關。<lb/>在六個真實世界數據集上的實驗表明，McWC 實現了最先進的性能，展現了卓越的計算效率和歷史信息提取能力。
2606.17996.author: Bin Wang et.al.
2606.17996.authors: Bin Wang, Heming Yang, Jinfang Sheng
